package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_allocation_in_hash_or_less_func: Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag allocations inside sort comparison or hashing callbacks.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule544NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario544Negative(records []Rule544NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
